titles.title: Man of sorrows what a name

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: “Man of Sorrows,” what a name For the Son of God who came Ruined sinners to reclaim! Hallelujah! what a Savior!

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Guilty, vile, and helpless, we, Spotless Lamb of God was He; Full redemption—can it be? Hallelujah! what a Savior!

verse.name: v4
v5
verse.lines: When He comes, our glorious King, To His kingdom us to bring, Then anew this song we’ll sing Hallelujah! what a Savior!
